reference: Sir, nodes were found in my liver last year, in October two thousand and twelve. I am under treatment for tuberculosis at Christian Medical College, Vellore. Now I am well with no problems. I went to Christian Medical College on November twenty, two thousand and thirteen, for a final check-up at the doctor's advice. The doctor stopped medication now, and the ultrasound report shows that the node size decreased from four centimeters to two centimeters. Now the doctor advised me to stop all medication, and if any problem arises, I was advised to come back to Christian Medical College. I seek your advice.
text: Sir, nodes were found in my liver last year, in October 2012. I am under treatment for tuberculosis at Christian Medical College, fellow. Now I am well with no problems. I went to Christian Medical College on November 20, 2013, for a final check-up at the doctor's advice. The doctor stopped medication now, and the ultrasound report shows that the node size decreased from 4cm to 2cm. Now the doctor advised me to stop all medication, and if any problem arises, I was advised to come back to Christian Medical College. Ask your advice.
